  1. org.springframework.cloud.stream.config

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.stream.config

Package
Description

org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka.config
 
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka.streams
 
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.config

org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.rabbit.config

  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.stream.config used by org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder
    Class
    Description
    BindingProperties
    Contains the properties of a binding.
    BindingServiceProperties
     
    ConsumerEndpointCustomizer
    If a single bean of this type is in the application context, an inbound channel adapter created by the binder can be further customized after all the properties are set.
    ListenerContainerCustomizer
    If a single bean of this type is in the application context, listener containers created by the binder can be further customized after all the properties are set.
    MessageSourceCustomizer
    If a single bean of this type is in the application context, pollable message sources created by the binder can be further customized after all the properties are set.
    ProducerMessageHandlerCustomizer
    If a single bean of this type is in the application context, a producing message handler created by the binder can be further customized after all the properties are set.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.stream.config used by org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka
    Class
    Description
    ListenerContainerCustomizer
    If a single bean of this type is in the application context, listener containers created by the binder can be further customized after all the properties are set.
    MessageSourceCustomizer
    If a single bean of this type is in the application context, pollable message sources created by the binder can be further customized after all the properties are set.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.stream.config used by org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka.config
    Class
    Description
    BindingHandlerAdvise.MappingsProvider
    Provides mappings including the default mappings.

    Provides mappings including the default mappings.
